headline: ABRASILVER DRILLS 68.5m AT 343 g/t SILVER — Including 17m AT 917 g/t at Diablillos, Argentina
snippet: AbraSilver Resource Corp. (TSX: ABRA) returned one of the year's standout silver intercepts at the advanced Diablillos project in Argentina — 68.5m averaging 343 g/t silver including a bonanza 17-metre core at 917 g/t, confirming high-grade continuity between the Oculto and JAC zones.

headline: NGEX DISCOVERS NEW COPPER ZONE 300m EAST OF MARS: 48m AT 7.72% CuEq, 23m AT 4.72% CuEq
snippet: NGEx Minerals (TSX: NGEX) wrapped Phase 4 at Lunahuasi with exceptional copper-gold-silver grades and a brand new zone discovery just 60m below surface — open in all directions — suggesting the Lundin-backed system still has substantial room to grow beyond its current resource.

headline: MINING M&A HITS $21.6B IN Q1 2026 — Strongest Opening Quarter Since 2023
snippet: Global mining M&A reached $21.6 billion in Q1 2026, up 34% over Q1 2025, as 121 deals closed driven by precious metals consolidation and critical minerals supply-chain positioning. Billion-dollar mega-deals rose 68% from 2024 according to White & Case.

headline: FOUR DISCOVERIES IN ONE YEAR: Americas Gold Hits 1,392 g/t Ag at Idaho's Galena Complex
snippet: Americas Gold and Silver (TSX: USA) announced its fourth major new discovery at the producing Galena Complex in Idaho — six new silver-copper-antimony veins grading up to 1,392 g/t Ag over 1.9m, located just 25m from existing mine infrastructure and wide open for expansion.

headline: SIX STRAIGHT YEARS IN DEFICIT: Silver Market Cumulative Shortfall Now 762 Million Ounces
snippet: The Silver Institute's World Silver Survey 2026 confirmed a sixth consecutive year of structural supply deficit, bringing the cumulative shortfall to 762 million ounces. Industrial demand from solar panels, EVs, and electronics continues to far outpace the pace of new mine supply growth.

headline: Critical Elements Expands Rose West to 1,250 x 800m — Drills 1.89% Li2O Over 13.5m in Quebec
snippet: Critical Elements Lithium Corp. (TSXV: CRE) released Phase 1 assays from the Rose West Discovery in Quebec, growing the mineralized footprint from 450m x 370m to 1,250m x 800m and hitting 1.89% Li2O over 13.5m, with three new spodumene-bearing pegmatite bodies identified.

headline: Mustang Energy Returns 4.9m at 2.69% Copper — Near-Surface Hit Near Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan
snippet: Mustang Energy's Bob Lake area at Surprise Creek delivered a near-surface copper hit — 4.9m at 2.69% Cu, including 0.5m at 15.9% Cu at only 6.8m depth — from a uranium-copper project 25km northwest of the Athabasca Basin's historic Beaverlodge uranium district.

headline: EMPEROR METALS Delivers 1.46Moz at 1.69 g/t Gold Resource at Duquesne West, Quebec
snippet: Emperor Metals (CSE: AUOZ) released an updated mineral resource estimate of 1.46 million ounces of gold at an average grade of 1.69 g/t Au for the Duquesne West project in Quebec's prolific Abitibi gold belt, a milestone for the junior explorer's 2026 campaign.

headline: SLAM HITS 40.5 g/t GOLD at Jake Lee Project, New Brunswick — 7,000m Drill Now Underway
snippet: SLAM Exploration sampled up to 40.5 g/t Au and 63.3 g/t Ag from channel samples at the Jake Lee gold project in New Brunswick and has now signed a 7,000-metre diamond drilling contract, with a rig on site and drilling in progress.

headline: World Bank Warns Gold and Silver Face Price Ceiling in 2026 — Contrarian View on the Bull Run
snippet: The World Bank published analysis suggesting precious metals prices may hit a structural ceiling through 2026 despite ongoing central bank demand and geopolitical tension — a contrarian view worth stress-testing as gold holds above $4,600 and silver trades near $74.

headline: USA Rare Earth's $2.8B Serra Verde Deal: Bold Bet to Break China's Grip on Heavy Rare Earths
snippet: USA Rare Earth's acquisition of Brazil's Serra Verde mine provides immediate cash flow and a domestic supply of heavy rare-earth feedstock, enabling magnet-factory scale-up while the company's Round Top mine in Texas awaits 2028 completion. The Motley Fool breaks down whether the $2.8B premium is justified.
